data.title: NYSE delivers Pre-Market update on July 18, 2025 with strong earnings and data, boosting Wall Street momentum.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in New York, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued its daily pre-market report from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors are encouraged to review the latest NYSE Pre-market update for essential market information prior to the trading day. The July 18th pre-market update was presented by Caroline Woods.

data.title: UK MPs are split over crypto donation risks amid updates to campaign laws.
data.description: In the UK, parliamentarians are divided on the topic of cryptocurrencies as they aim to revise campaign donation regulations.

data.title: OsteoStrong opening new location in Mooresville, NC, bringing skeletal strengthening tech to Charlotte metro area.
data.description: OsteoStrong, a prominent provider of science-based skeletal strengthening technology, is extending its services to the wider Charlotte metropolitan area. As of July 18, 2025, the company has established a new facility in Mooresville, North Carolina. This expansion aims to cater to the growing demand for skeletal strength conditioning in the region. Swiftly becoming a global leader in this field, OsteoStrong looks to reach more individuals looking to improve their bone health.

data.title: Pump.fun is a Solana meme coin factory where users can create tokens in minutes for free, leading to top memes of 2024.
data.description: A platform called Pump.fun enables users to generate Solana tokens within a minute at zero cost, leading to the emergence of popular memes in 2024.

data.title: Join GAP and "Fritz and Friends" for ".NET AI Bootcamp" at 10AM EDT today on twitch.tv/csharpfritz, plus ".NET Aspire Workshop" next week, offering hands-on coding and prizes.
data.description: The ".NET AI Bootcamp" begins streaming live today on twitch.tv/csharpfritz, followed by the ".NET Aspire Workshop" on July 25. These events will offer hands-on coding sessions, chances to win prizes, and a promise of no dull slide presentations. The kick-off is in Austin, Texas, dated July 18, 2025, as part of Growth Acceleration's initiative.

data.title: Ja Mining expands cloud mining platform with XRP integration, global reach, & renewable energy focus, enabling easy access to digital assets.
data.description: In London, UK on July 18, 2025, Ja Mining has announced the inclusion of XRP mining in its cloud platform in response to the rising global demand for accessible and energy-efficient cryptocurrency mining. This move is a part of a broader initiative aimed at expanding the platform's reach globally and providing users with easy access to digital asset infrastructure, eliminating the need for technical setups or hardware investments. The cloud model offered by Jamining.com overcomes traditional mining obstacles by providing a user-friendly dashboard accessible via a web browser and enabling one-click mining activation. Users can engage in mining activities from any location worldwide using either a smartphone or a computer, allowing widespread access to digital assets such as XRP, Bitcoin, and Litecoin. This effort reflects the company's commitment to making cryptocurrency mining more accessible and inclusive on a global scale.

data.title: Metallus to release 2nd Quarter 2025 results on August 7, after market closes on NYSE. Leader in specialty metals.
data.description: Headquartered in Canton, Ohio, the renowned Metallus company (NYSE: MTUS), known for its top-notch specialty metals, components, and supply chain solutions, is set to unveil its Q2 2025 financial results on Thursday, August 7. The report will be disclosed post-market hours on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Free Yourself wins Best Aqueous Fragrance award with Eau at Marie Claire UK Fragrance Awards 2025 - BENNINGTON, Vt., July 18, 2025.
data.description: In Bennington, Vermont, on July 18, 2025, Free Yourself proudly revealed that their fragrance Eau has won the Best Aqueous Fragrance award at the esteemed Marie Claire UK Fragrance Awards 2025. This recognition emphasizes Eau's exceptional scent, showcasing its remarkable olfactory blend.

data.title: Investors in Reddit, Inc. (NYSE: RDDT) advised to contact Levi & Korsinsky regarding securities lawsuit - Jul 18, 2025.
data.description: A legal firm, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP, has informed investors in Reddit, Inc. (NYSE: RDDT) about a class action securities lawsuit as of July 18, 2025. The lawsuit aims to assist investors who incurred losses in their investments in Reddit, Inc. The lawsuit is specifically for individuals who held shares in the Company.
